headline.text: L2 ML2 PTL pump seized twice in the window — cleared by 11:18 but compounding reliability risk, while L3 ML1 needs *immediate drain* for foreign metal in buffer tank.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran caramel through Sollich 3 with a 12-minute belt tracking stop at 01:18 and a printer clog at 10:19, both cleared. Sollich 2 has a leaking caramel nozzle at 06:17 and a damaged gasket leak discovered at 12:10. Sollich 4 is in startup with missing cooling tunnel parts flagged at 13:01.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 PTL pump failed twice — first at 00:26, cleared by 04:59 after a leaking reinstall, then seized again at 09:52 and cleared by 11:18. FW sealing bar stopped the line at 07:14 for 31 minutes and twins belt replacement at 08:24 for 14 minutes, both resolved. ML3 had brief belt sensor stops (all under 20 minutes) and a foreign material scare from a broken auger blade at 22:50 — inspected and cleared by 00:38.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 ran bars with recurring temper spikes causing multiple pauses through second and third shift, all cleared but pattern unresolved. A brass fitting fell into the buffer tank at 12:15 — Robert flagged immediate drain required to prevent pump or temper damage. A broken belt at 04:46 and camera alarm at 01:41 both cleared same shift. ML4 ramped from 10 to 20 mpm during first shift with three gondola jams early (cleared by 04:27), TG3 film ripping at 02:02 (resolved by 04:17), and compressor faulting five times between 21:21 and 07:35. Label typo on MF Matrix corrected by 12:57.

notes.text: Last pallet of cookies delivered at 23:53; estimated 1,050 lbs remain as of 09:36, may run short of 1,180 case target.
Chiller procedure clarified — leave on during shutdown to prevent PTL chocolate freeze per Preston at 10:42.
Cereal 2pm transfer missed at 16:02; requested out-of-FIFO from L2 to continue running.

resolved.title: S3 belt C21 tracking off, 12-minute stop
resolved.summary: Belt C21 tracking off due to dirty rollers, stopped 12 minutes to clean at 01:18.
resolved.resolution: Rollers cleaned, belt tracking properly by 04:06 (S3 Pack).

resolved.title: S3 Matrix 3 printer clogged
resolved.summary: Matrix 3 printer clogged at 10:19, had to clean, caused extra scrap.

resolved.title: ML3 broken auger blade foreign material scare
resolved.summary: Water leak discovered on sweco at 22:50, broken tank blade found; depositor drained to check for foreign material.
resolved.resolution: Tank drained, damaged end replaced, no FM found in chocolate or tank by 00:38 — "No FM was found" (Victor Leandro).

resolved.title: ML2 FW 082 alarm after screen power loss
resolved.summary: FW screen went off at 01:22, threw 082 fault that wouldn't clear; maintenance power-cycled multiple times, fault cleared at 02:15.
resolved.resolution: Fault cleared after another power cycle at 02:15 — "FW is ready" (Alex Mendoza).

resolved.title: ML2 FW sealing bar stop
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 07:14 for sealing bar issue, down 31 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Line running again at 07:45 — "Line start running" (ML2 FW).

resolved.title: ML2 FW twins belt replacement
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 08:24, twins belt one needed replacement, ATP passed at 08:34.
resolved.resolution: Belt replaced, ATP passed, line running at 08:38 — "Star line running up" (ML2 FW).

resolved.title: ML3 belt sensor at 15:25 needed replacement
resolved.summary: Belt stopped moving at 15:25, needed replacement.
resolved.resolution: Belt replaced, QA swabbed and passed, line running by 15:38 (Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: ML3 cross conveyor sensor S3-B30 adjusted
resolved.summary: Cross conveyor belt after down ramp not working, maintenance adjusted sensor.
resolved.resolution: Sensor S3-B30 adjusted by maintenance at 15:46 (Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: ML3 belt sensor S4-M1 8-minute stop
resolved.summary: Belt sensor issue at 20:37, line down 8 minutes from 20:32 to 20:40.
resolved.resolution: Sensor S4-M1 fixed, line up by 20:40 — down 8 minutes total (Brandon Lance at 20:59).

resolved.title: ML4 TG3 film ripping, couldn't get machine up
resolved.summary: TG3 down at 02:02, film kept ripping and throwing errors; maintenance working.
resolved.resolution: TG3 back up at 04:17 after switching film twice and a CIL — "TG3 is back up" (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: ML4 gondola jams from leftover test product
resolved.summary: Three product jams on gondola caused by leftover testing product at 21:03.
resolved.resolution: Gondola cleared and cleaned by 04:27, no further jams reported (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: ML1 broken belt at 04:46
resolved.summary: Belt broken at 04:46, maintenance working on it.
resolved.resolution: Belt appears resolved; C6 and metal detector running correctly by 05:13 (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: ML1 camera alarm at 01:41
resolved.summary: Camera alarm triggered, QA called to inspect.
resolved.resolution: QA, maintenance, and manager inspected at 01:47 — "No issues found" (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: MF Matrix label typo 'sea salk' instead of 'sea salt'
resolved.summary: Label read 'utt truf bite sea salk' instead of 'sea salt'; IMS couldn't modify, decision to label and fix later.
resolved.resolution: Laura closed out of file and corrected label by 12:57 — "Anything they print from here on will be correct" (Laura Brady).

needs_attention.title: S4 missing cooling tunnel rail pins and parts
needs_attention.summary: Missing pins to hold rails in cooling tunnel 1 at 13:01; Jakob raised concerns at 16:19 about parts getting lost during disassembly.
needs_attention.status: Curt identified spare parts on table at 13:49; Jakob flagged broader parts-management concern at 16:19, no resolution posted.

needs_attention.title: S3 caramel depositor nozzle leaking
needs_attention.summary: One nozzle on caramel depositor leaking as of 06:17.
needs_attention.status: Leak reported at 06:17, no follow-up on repair by window close.

needs_attention.title: S3 Matrix 5 intermittent date/lot printing
needs_attention.summary: Matrix 5 experiencing intermittent blurry or missing date and lot printing at 10:58, then resumes correct printing.
needs_attention.status: Nathan confirmed addressed and printer head cleaned at 11:02, but original report flagged need for continuous monitoring.

needs_attention.title: S2 return pipe gasket damaged, chocolate leaking
needs_attention.summary: During return pipe clean at 12:10, chocolate leaking from non-allergen side; gasket damaged and needs replacement.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance looking into damaged gasket at 12:10, no resolution posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: S2 drain cover possible mold
needs_attention.summary: Drain cover appears to have mold on it at 12:26, QA investigating.
needs_attention.status: QA to investigate mold-like appearance on drain cover as of 12:26, no follow-up by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML2 PTL pump seized twice in 24 hours
needs_attention.summary: Pump shut off at 00:26, disassembled and cleaned; reinstalled but leaking at 03:21, torn down again; reinstalled at 04:43 and running by 04:59. Seized again at 09:52, cleared by 11:18.
needs_attention.status: Pump reinstalled and ATP passed at 11:18, running as of window close. Two failures in 11 hours indicates compounding reliability risk.

needs_attention.title: ML3 depositor gasket seal failing
needs_attention.summary: Gasket seal issue flagged at 08:27, Alex looking for replacement gasket.
needs_attention.status: Alex confirmed looking for replacement gasket as of 08:29, no follow-up on install by window close.

needs_attention.title: Plant door retractable arm broken
needs_attention.summary: Retractable arm broken on door going to back parking lot at 19:09.
needs_attention.status: Brandon notified maintenance at 19:11, no follow-up on repair posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML4 compressor faulting 5+ times
needs_attention.summary: Compressor faulted 4 times during second shift starting at 21:21, then 5th time at 04:33, even running on single compressor.
needs_attention.status: Matt flagged vendor outreach for today; compressor tripped again at 07:35. Pattern suggests underlying issue not yet resolved.

needs_attention.title: ML1 brass fitting in buffer tank requires drain
needs_attention.summary: Brass cap/fitting from pump sprayer fell into buffer tank at 12:15 during cleaning; Robert flagged immediate risk to pump and temper unit if not removed.
needs_attention.status: Tank must be drained to remove metal nozzle tip as of 12:55 — "will absolutely destroy anything it encounters in the temper unit" per Robert.

needs_attention.title: ML1 recurring temper control issues
needs_attention.summary: Multiple high temper readings (1.1, 1.4, 1.7 slope) caused line pauses at 18:07, 20:09, 21:20 through second and third shift; adjustments to crystallization and mixing water providing temporary relief only.
needs_attention.status: Line running as of window close but pattern unresolved; Nathan and Robert experimenting with crystallization and mixing water settings.

needs_attention.title: ML1 missing chicane belt roller
needs_attention.summary: During chicane belt reinstall at 11:27, one roller missing; third shift performed disassembly but roller cannot be found.
needs_attention.status: Searched but cannot find roller as of 11:27, may need to order replacement.
